streamlit_debug.description: VS Code launch configuration for debugging Streamlit app

fastapi_debug.description: VS Code launch configuration for debugging FastAPI backend

setup: 1. Copy the configurations from this file to your .vscode/launch.json
2. Or create .vscode/launch.json with the configurations above
usage: 2. In VS Code: F5 or Run and Debug -> 'Debug Streamlit App'
3. Set breakpoints in streamlit_app.py or src/ files
4. Use the Streamlit UI to trigger your breakpoints

environment_variables.DEBUG_STREAMLIT: Set to 'true' to enable debug mode
environment_variables.PYTHONPATH: Should include the project root directory
